design_system.emotional_tone: Precision, Control, Elite Performance, Tactical Tech
core_principles: Data over decoration: Let the real-time metrics be the visual hero.
Tactical Minimalism: Use 1px solid strokes, sharp edges, and high-contrast glowing accents instead of soft shadows.
Control Room Grid: Dense, pixel-perfect alignment. No empty jagged spaces.
Functional Color: 90% monochrome UI. Colors only indicate system health (Good, Warning, Danger) or AI insights.

scale.data_large: text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-mono font-medium tabular-nums tracking-tighter

rules: All numeric data (CPU %, RAM GB) MUST use 'font-mono tabular-nums' to prevent layout jitter during real-time updates.
Card titles/headers must be uppercase with wide letter spacing (tracking-[0.2em]) to establish a technical, command-center feel.
Headings should use font-black or font-bold with tight letter spacing.

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Mode B: The Control Room Grid
rules: Use strict grid layouts: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 or lg:grid-cols-12.
Dense spacing: gap-4 or gap-6 for dashboard widgets.
Cards must stretch to fill vertical space using h-full to prevent jagged rows.
Padding: Generous inside cards (p-6) to let data breathe, despite tight gaps.

ai_recommendations.classes: bg-[#0a111a] border border-cyan-500/30 rounded-sm relative overflow-hidden
ai_recommendations.extras: Add a subtle linear gradient background or a top border of 2px solid #00FFFF to denote AI.

charts.style: Minimalist area/line charts. No grid lines except minimal horizontal ticks. Stroke width 2px. Smooth curves.
charts.colors: Bind line/fill colors to status (e.g., #00FF66 for <50%, #FFCC00 for 50-85%, #FF3B30 for >85%).

buttons.primary: bg-[#00FF66] text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-wide rounded-sm px-6 py-2 hover:bg-[#00e55b] transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#00FF66]/50 focus:outline-none
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:bg-white/10 hover:border-white/40 transition-colors rounded-sm px-4 py-2
buttons.danger: bg-transparent border border-[#FF3B30]/50 text-[#FF3B30] hover:bg-[#FF3B30] hover:text-white transition-colors rounded-sm px-4 py-2

tables_process_list.style: Dense tabular layout. border-collapse. Subdued row borders (border-b border-white/5). Hover state: hover:bg-white/5.
tables_process_list.typography: Use font-mono for process IDs and memory usage columns.

icons.usage: Use 'weight="bold"' or 'weight="duotone"' for primary navigation, 'weight="regular"' for inline metrics.
icons.size: Standardize on size={20} for inline, size={24} for headers/cards.

rules: Minimalist and functional. No bouncy or playful animations.
Data updates: Transition widths/heights linearly, but snap numbers instantly (tabular-nums).
Interactive states: Fast transitions (duration-150) for hover/active states.
Hover effects on process lists: Instant background color change to maintain perception of speed.

ai_background.description: Abstract metallic sculpture with iridescent blue and purple hues. Use with extreme opacity reduction (e.g., opacity-10) behind the AI Optimization Recommendations panel to give it depth.

requirements: All buttons, navigation links, and action elements MUST have a data-testid attribute.
Data metric displays MUST have a data-testid for assertion testing (e.g., data-testid='cpu-usage-value').
Process list items MUST include predictable data-testids (e.g., data-testid='process-kill-button-1234').

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Generate pure .js or .jsx files, NO TYPESCRIPT. Remove any TypeScript type annotations from standard Shadcn UI components if copying them.
Do NOT center-align everything. This is a technical dashboard; left-align data and labels for quick scannability.
Implement the 'Control Room' grid layout for the main dashboard. Utilize the full width of the screen (max-w-[1600px] or full width with padding).
Use Phosphor icons instead of Lucide to maintain the sharp, technical aesthetic.
Build a 'System Health Score' hero widget as the primary focal point (e.g., a large circular gauge or giant metric number) using the #00FF66 (Volt Green) accent color.
The 'AI-Powered Optimization Recommendations' section must visually distinct from standard data cards. Use the #00FFFF cyan accent and a subtle background image/gradient.
Real-time monitoring charts should use 'recharts'. Strip away chart grid lines and legends for a clean, brutalist look. Ensure line strokes are 2px solid.
For the Task Scheduler and Process Manager, use dense list/table views with clear 'Kill Process' or 'Run Task' danger/primary buttons.
Never use pure black or grey without a slight tint if needed, though this design specifies absolute obsidian (#050505). Stick strictly to the defined color palette.
